title: Real-time Data Analytics Dashboard
description: Built an interactive dashboard that processes and visualizes real-time data streams from multiple sources. Features include live metrics, custom reports, and predictive insights.

title: Customer Segmentation ML Model
description: Machine learning model using clustering algorithms to segment customers for targeted marketing campaigns. Achieved 94% accuracy with improved targeting ROI.

title: Web Scraping & Data Pipeline
description: Automated web scraper with ETL pipeline for gathering and processing competitive intelligence data. Handles 10K+ records daily with 99.8% reliability.

title: Sentiment Analysis API
description: REST API for analyzing sentiment from text using NLP and deep learning models. Achieves 89% accuracy across multiple languages with sub-100ms response times.

title: Time Series Forecasting System
description: ARIMA and Prophet-based forecasting models predicting sales trends with 92% accuracy. Includes confidence intervals and anomaly detection.

title: Image Classification Model
description: CNN-based deep learning model for product classification achieving 95% accuracy on validation set. Handles 50+ product categories.

title: Data Quality Monitoring System
description: Automated system for monitoring data quality across multiple sources. Detects anomalies, missing values, and data drift with configurable alerts.

title: Recommendation Engine
description: Collaborative filtering based recommendation system serving 1M+ users. Uses matrix factorization for personalized product recommendations.
